description: Style Note No chance of making a fashion faux pas when you're carrying the wallet from Reid and Taylor clean, classic styling made of genuine, understated leather, this piece would also make a great gift. Featuring multiple card slots, this sleek wallet offers unbeatable practical style. Product Details Black two-fold leather wallet Has two flap style compartments Has five card slots and a slip pocket on either side of the wallet Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 9 cm x 13 cm
